summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (PWA support) and REQ-2 (step counter fix) with high fidelity. manifest.json is created with all required fields, a service worker is added with ICP bypass patterns, index.html is updated with manifest link, the service worker is registered in App.tsx, useStepTracker hook is updated with improved step detection and permission handling, and StepTrackerWidget shows permission states including a denied message. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: Permission is proactively requested in App.tsx immediately after login (1.5s delay), before the user interacts with the step tracker widget.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 states permission should be requested 'when the user starts tracking', not automatically on login. The App.tsx implementation requests DeviceMotion permission automatically 1.5 seconds after authentication, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Apple-specific PWA meta tags added to index.html (apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, apple-mobile-web-app-title, apple-touch-icon).
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'iOS Safari PWA support is not required for this request' as a non-goal, yet Apple-specific PWA tags were added.
